results.rendered_html:
rāmā [ramate'nayā ram karaṇe ghañ]
1 A beautiful woman, a charming young
(pb) woman; atha rāmā vikasanmukhī babhūva  Bv. 2. 16 ; 3. 6. 
2 A beloved, wife, mistress;  R. 12. 23 , 14. 27. 
3 A woman in general; rāmā haraṃti hṛdayaṃ prasabhaṃ narāṇāṃ  Rs. 6. 25. 
4 A woman of origin.
5 Vermilion.
6 Asa Fœtida.
7 A kind of pigment (gorocanā).
8 Ruddle.
9 A river.
10 An accomplished woman (versed in fine arts).
